question: The meeting was ____ because of the manager's illness.
explanation: 'Call off' signifie annuler (cancel). L'événement n'aura pas lieu.

question: We need to ____ a solution to this problem before Friday.
explanation: 'Come up with' signifie trouver ou imaginer (une idée, un plan, une solution).

question: Could you please ____ this form and sign it at the bottom?
explanation: 'Fill out' (ou 'fill in') signifie remplir un document ou un formulaire.

question: I am really looking ____ to seeing you at the conference.
explanation: 'Look forward to' signifie avoir hâte de faire quelque chose ou d'assister à un événement.

question: Never ____ up, even when the negotiations get difficult!
explanation: 'Give up' signifie abandonner ou renoncer.

question: They had to ____ the match until next week due to heavy rain.
explanation: 'Put off' signifie reporter ou repousser à plus tard (postpone).

question: He ____ down the job offer because the salary was too low.
explanation: 'Turn down' signifie refuser ou rejeter une offre.

question: We have ____ out of printing paper, we need to order more immediately.
explanation: 'Run out of' signifie être à court de quelque chose (ne plus en avoir en stock).

question: Can you ____ me up from the airport at 6 PM?
explanation: 'Pick up' dans ce contexte signifie passer prendre quelqu'un, généralement en voiture.

question: The company plans to ____ on a hundred new employees this year.
explanation: 'Take on' signifie embaucher (hire) du personnel.

question: Please make sure to ____ off the lights before leaving the office.
explanation: 'Turn off' (ou 'switch off') signifie éteindre.

question: I didn't expect to ____ into my old boss at the supermarket.
explanation: 'Run into' signifie rencontrer quelqu'un par hasard (bump into).

question: We need to ____ over the contract details before signing.
explanation: 'Go over' signifie examiner ou passer en revue (review).

question: The IT department will ____ up the new computers tomorrow.
explanation: 'Set up' signifie installer ou configurer du matériel.

question: She was able to ____ out the complicated math problem by herself.
explanation: 'Figure out' signifie comprendre ou résoudre un problème par la réflexion.

question: I will ____ up the supplier's phone number in the directory.
explanation: 'Look up' signifie chercher une information (dans un dictionnaire, un annuaire, sur internet).

question: Don't forget to ____ on your hard hat before entering the construction site.
explanation: 'Put on' signifie mettre (un vêtement ou un équipement de protection).

question: The factory had to ____ off 50 workers due to budget cuts.
explanation: 'Lay off' signifie licencier pour des raisons économiques.

question: We should ____ ahead with the project despite the potential risks.
explanation: 'Go ahead' signifie aller de l'avant ou commencer/continuer ce qui était prévu.

question: She tried to ____ out what was causing the error in the software.
explanation: 'Find out' signifie découvrir ou obtenir une information.
